title: Artifact Contamination in Output
description: The IoTAgent's response includes a stray word 'Question' appended to the asset list ('Chiller 3.  Question'), which appears to be a data artifact or prompt leakage. This was not caught or cleaned up before being passed to the final answer, indicating insufficient output sanitization.

title: Data Artifact Propagation
description: The raw IoTAgent response contains a spurious trailing token 'Question' appended to the asset list (e.g., 'Chiller 3.  Question'), which appears to be a formatting or parsing artifact. Neither the orchestrating agent nor the review agent flagged or removed this artifact before it was passed into the final answer, indicating a failure to sanitize output data.

title: Sub-Agent Loop Without Adaptation
description: The orchestrating agent called IoTAgent three times with the exact same request parameter despite receiving 'Not Accomplished' status and explicit corrective suggestions from the review agent each time. This indicates the outer agent failed to adapt its sub-agent invocation strategy based on feedback, wasting resources and delaying task completion.

failure mode: Indirect Result Delivery via File Path
title: Indirect Result Delivery via File Path
description: In Observation 3, the IoTAgent returned only a file path to the metadata rather than the actual metadata content, forcing the orchestrating agent to invoke an additional jsonreader tool to retrieve the data. This indirect result delivery pattern adds unnecessary steps and indicates the sub-agent did not fully complete its assigned responsibility.

title: Malformed Output Formatting
description: The final answer is missing a closing quotation mark (The sites are: "MAIN instead of "MAIN") and the answer is prefixed with 'answer=' in the final output, indicating the tool parameter was not properly parsed or formatted before being returned to the user.

title: Output Formatting Error
description: The final answer passed to the Finish tool is missing a closing quotation mark: 'answer=The sites are: "MAIN' instead of 'answer=The sites are: "MAIN"'. This indicates a string truncation or formatting bug in how the answer is assembled and passed to the tool.

title: Noisy Observation Passthrough
description: The IoTAgent's observation includes extraneous text appended to the answer field ('The sites are: \"MAIN\"  Question'), suggesting the raw tool output contains noise or artifacts that are not cleaned or validated before being used in the final response.
